form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 4th on April 9 over 410m at Horsham behind Chill Out Plate beaten 3 lengths (24.02) in a Grade 5. Still to win from this draw but has been in the placings three times. Top chance.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th on April 6 over 390m at Warrnambool behind Penny Pinto beaten 9 lengths (23.08) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Could only manage eighth last time but the start prior went down fighting at double figure odds when second (24.53) over 425m at this track. Tough draw to overcome but is in the mix.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Healesville over 350m. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.comment: Has finished sixth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Healesville over 350m. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 2 length sixth (19.91) over 350m at Healesville. Yet to win but has been in the money two times from three starts off this box. Right in the mix.
